# camxiom public API symbol-set snapshot (roadmap Rel1a).
# AUTO-GENERATED by tests/api_snapshot/check_public_api.py -- do not edit by hand.
# Regenerate after a DELIBERATE API change:
#   CAMXIOM_UPDATE_API_SNAPSHOT=1 ctest -R camxiom_api_snapshot_test
#   (or run the script directly with --update)
# A diff here means the public API surface changed. If unintended, revert it;
# if intended, review the diff and regenerate this file in the same commit.

camxiom::opencv | [[nodiscard]] int distortPoints( const CameraModel &model, const std::vector<cv::Point2f> &src_points, std::vector<cv::Point2f> &dst_points_out )
camxiom::opencv | [[nodiscard]] int projectPoints( const CameraModel &model, const std::vector<cv::Point3f> &object_points, const cv::Vec3d &rvec, const cv::Vec3d &tvec, std::vector<cv::Point2f> &image_points_out )
camxiom::opencv | [[nodiscard]] int undistortPoints( const CameraModel &model, const std::vector<cv::Point2f> &src_points, std::vector<cv::Point2f> &dst_points_out, const cv::Mat &R = cv::Mat(), const cv::Mat &P = cv::Mat(), const SolverOptions &opts = SolverOptions{} )
camxiom::opencv | class RemapCache
camxiom::opencv | namespace fisheye
camxiom::opencv | namespace omnidirectional
camxiom::opencv | namespace pinhole
camxiom::opencv | using camxiom::CameraModel
camxiom::opencv | using camxiom::ImageRemapOptions
camxiom::opencv | using camxiom::ImageRemapResult
camxiom::opencv | using camxiom::ImageSize
camxiom::opencv | using camxiom::RectifiedOutputModelOptions
camxiom::opencv | using camxiom::RectifyRemapResult
camxiom::opencv | using camxiom::RemapResult
camxiom::opencv | using camxiom::SolverOptions
camxiom::opencv::RemapCache | RectifyRemapResult buildRectify( const CameraModel &src_model, ImageSize src_size, const RectifiedOutputModelOptions &options = RectifiedOutputModelOptions{} )
camxiom::opencv::RemapCache | RemapCache() = default
camxiom::opencv::RemapCache | RemapResult build( const CameraModel &src_model, const CameraModel &dst_model, int width, int height, const SolverOptions &solver_options = SolverOptions{} )
camxiom::opencv::RemapCache | RemapResult buildUndistort( const CameraModel &src_model, int width, int height, const SolverOptions &solver_options = SolverOptions{} )
camxiom::opencv::RemapCache | [[nodiscard]] bool apply( const cv::Mat &src, cv::Mat &dst, int interpolation = 1, int border_mode = 0, const cv::Scalar &border_value = cv::Scalar() ) const
camxiom::opencv::RemapCache | [[nodiscard]] bool isValid() const
camxiom::opencv::RemapCache | const cv::Mat &map1() const
camxiom::opencv::RemapCache | const cv::Mat &map2() const
camxiom::opencv::RemapCache | int height() const
camxiom::opencv::RemapCache | int width() const
camxiom::opencv::RemapCache | void clear()
camxiom::opencv::fisheye | [[nodiscard]] bool distortImage( const cv::Mat &src, cv::Mat &dst, const cv::Mat &camera_matrix, const cv::Mat &dist_coeffs, const cv::Mat &new_camera_matrix = cv::Mat(), int interpolation = 1, const SolverOptions &solver_options = SolverOptions{} )
camxiom::opencv::fisheye | [[nodiscard]] bool undistortImage( const cv::Mat &src, cv::Mat &dst, const cv::Mat &camera_matrix, const cv::Mat &dist_coeffs, const cv::Mat &new_camera_matrix = cv::Mat(), int interpolation = 1, const SolverOptions &solver_options = SolverOptions{} )
camxiom::opencv::fisheye | [[nodiscard]] int distortPoints( const cv::Mat &src_points, std::vector<cv::Point2f> &dst_points, const cv::Mat &camera_matrix, const cv::Mat &dist_coeffs )
camxiom::opencv::fisheye | [[nodiscard]] int distortPoints( const std::vector<cv::Point2f> &src_points, std::vector<cv::Point2f> &dst_points, const cv::Mat &camera_matrix, const cv::Mat &dist_coeffs )
camxiom::opencv::fisheye | [[nodiscard]] int projectPoints( const cv::Mat &object_points, const cv::Mat &rvec, const cv::Mat &tvec, const cv::Mat &camera_matrix, const cv::Mat &dist_coeffs, std::vector<cv::Point2f> &image_points )

=== include/camxiom/optimizer/pnp_flag.hpp ===
camxiom::optimizer | [[nodiscard]] constexpr bool hasAllFlags(PnpFlag f, PnpFlag bits)
camxiom::optimizer | [[nodiscard]] constexpr bool hasAnyFlag(PnpFlag f, PnpFlag bits)
camxiom::optimizer | [[nodiscard]] constexpr bool hasFlag(PnpFlag f, PnpFlag bit)
camxiom::optimizer | constexpr PnpFlag &operator|=(PnpFlag &a, PnpFlag b)
camxiom::optimizer | constexpr PnpFlag operator&(PnpFlag a, PnpFlag b)
camxiom::optimizer | constexpr PnpFlag operator|(PnpFlag a, PnpFlag b)
camxiom::optimizer | constexpr PnpFlagUnderlying toUnderlying(PnpFlag f)
camxiom::optimizer | constexpr void unsetFlags(PnpFlag &f, PnpFlag bits)
camxiom::optimizer | enum class PnpFlag : std::uint64_t
camxiom::optimizer | using PnpFlagUnderlying = std::underlying_type_t<PnpFlag>
camxiom::optimizer::PnpFlag | #000 NONE = 0
camxiom::optimizer::PnpFlag | #001 FIX_EXTRINSICS = 1ull << 0
camxiom::optimizer::PnpFlag | #002 FIX_FOCAL_LENGTHS = 1ull << 1
camxiom::optimizer::PnpFlag | #003 FIX_PRINCIPAL_POINTS = 1ull << 2
camxiom::optimizer::PnpFlag | #004 FIX_PROJECTION_PARAMS = 1ull << 3
camxiom::optimizer::PnpFlag | #005 FIX_DIST_0 = 1ull << 8
camxiom::optimizer::PnpFlag | #006 FIX_DIST_1 = 1ull << 9
camxiom::optimizer::PnpFlag | #007 FIX_DIST_2 = 1ull << 10
camxiom::optimizer::PnpFlag | #008 FIX_DIST_3 = 1ull << 11
camxiom::optimizer::PnpFlag | #009 FIX_DIST_4 = 1ull << 12
camxiom::optimizer::PnpFlag | #010 FIX_DIST_5 = 1ull << 13
camxiom::optimizer::PnpFlag | #011 FIX_DIST_6 = 1ull << 14
camxiom::optimizer::PnpFlag | #012 FIX_DIST_7 = 1ull << 15
camxiom::optimizer::PnpFlag | #013 FIX_DIST_8 = 1ull << 16
camxiom::optimizer::PnpFlag | #014 FIX_DIST_9 = 1ull << 17
camxiom::optimizer::PnpFlag | #015 FIX_DIST_10 = 1ull << 18
camxiom::optimizer::PnpFlag | #016 FIX_DIST_11 = 1ull << 19
camxiom::optimizer::PnpFlag | #017 FIX_DIST_12 = 1ull << 20
camxiom::optimizer::PnpFlag | #018 FIX_DIST_13 = 1ull << 21
camxiom::optimizer::PnpFlag | #019 FIX_INTRINSICS = FIX_FOCAL_LENGTHS | FIX_PRINCIPAL_POINTS
camxiom::optimizer::PnpFlag | #020 FIX_DISTORTION = FIX_DIST_0 | FIX_DIST_1 | FIX_DIST_2 | FIX_DIST_3 | FIX_DIST_4 | FIX_DIST_5 | FIX_DIST_6 | FIX_DIST_7 | FIX_DIST_8 | FIX_DIST_9 | FIX_DIST_10 | FIX_DIST_11 | FIX_DIST_12 | FIX_DIST_13
namespace camxiom::optimizer

=== include/camxiom/optimizer/pnp_solver.hpp ===
camxiom::optimizer | class PnpSolver
camxiom::optimizer | enum class PnpCostType : std::uint8_t
camxiom::optimizer | struct PnpBound
camxiom::optimizer | struct PnpInitialGuess
camxiom::optimizer | struct PnpOptimizerOptions
camxiom::optimizer | struct PnpSolverOptions
camxiom::optimizer | struct PnpSummary
camxiom::optimizer | struct [[nodiscard]] PnpResult
camxiom::optimizer | using ImagePointSets = std::vector<ImagePoints>
camxiom::optimizer | using ImagePoints = std::vector<Eigen::Vector2d>
camxiom::optimizer | using ObjectPointSets = std::vector<ObjectPoints>
camxiom::optimizer | using ObjectPoints = std::vector<Eigen::Vector3d>
camxiom::optimizer::PnpBound | Eigen::Vector2d focal_lengths
camxiom::optimizer::PnpBound | Eigen::Vector2d principal_points
camxiom::optimizer::PnpBound | double rot
camxiom::optimizer::PnpBound | double trans
camxiom::optimizer::PnpBound | static PnpBound createLowerBound()
camxiom::optimizer::PnpBound | static PnpBound createUpperBound()
camxiom::optimizer::PnpCostType | #000 AUTO_DIFF = 0
camxiom::optimizer::PnpCostType | #001 ANALYTICAL = 1
camxiom::optimizer::PnpInitialGuess | camxiom::CameraModel camera_model
camxiom::optimizer::PnpInitialGuess | std::vector<Eigen::Vector3d> rvecs
camxiom::optimizer::PnpInitialGuess | std::vector<Eigen::Vector3d> tvecs
camxiom::optimizer::PnpOptimizerOptions | bool minimizer_progress_to_stdout
camxiom::optimizer::PnpOptimizerOptions | double function_tolerance
camxiom::optimizer::PnpOptimizerOptions | double gradient_tolerance
camxiom::optimizer::PnpOptimizerOptions | double parameter_tolerance
camxiom::optimizer::PnpOptimizerOptions | int max_num_iterations
camxiom::optimizer::PnpSolver | PnpResult solve( const ObjectPointSets &object_points, const ImagePointSets &image_points, const PnpInitialGuess &initial_guess, const PnpSolverOptions &options = PnpSolverOptions(), PnpFlag flags = PnpFlag::NONE )
camxiom::optimizer::PnpSolver | PnpSolver &operator=(PnpSolver &&) noexcept
camxiom::optimizer::PnpSolver | PnpSolver &operator=(const PnpSolver &) = delete
camxiom::optimizer::PnpSolver | PnpSolver()
camxiom::optimizer::PnpSolver | PnpSolver(PnpSolver &&) noexcept
camxiom::optimizer::PnpSolver | PnpSolver(const PnpSolver &) = delete
camxiom::optimizer::PnpSolver | bool solve( const ObjectPointSets &object_points, const ImagePointSets &image_points, const PnpInitialGuess &initial_guess, PnpResult &result_out, const PnpSolverOptions &options = PnpSolverOptions(), PnpFlag flags = PnpFlag::NONE )
camxiom::optimizer::PnpSolver | bool solve( const ObjectPoints &object_points, const ImagePoints &image_points, const PnpInitialGuess &initial_guess, PnpResult &result_out, const PnpSolverOptions &options = PnpSolverOptions(), PnpFlag flags = PnpFlag::NONE )
camxiom::optimizer::PnpSolver | const PnpSummary &lastSummary() const
camxiom::optimizer::PnpSolver | ~PnpSolver()
camxiom::optimizer::PnpSolverOptions | PnpBound lower_bound
camxiom::optimizer::PnpSolverOptions | PnpBound upper_bound
camxiom::optimizer::PnpSolverOptions | PnpCostType cost_type
camxiom::optimizer::PnpSolverOptions | PnpOptimizerOptions solver_options
camxiom::optimizer::PnpSolverOptions | bool print_summary
camxiom::optimizer::PnpSolverOptions | double huber_loss_delta
camxiom::optimizer::PnpSummary | bool converged
camxiom::optimizer::PnpSummary | bool solution_usable
camxiom::optimizer::PnpSummary | double final_cost
camxiom::optimizer::PnpSummary | int num_successful_steps
camxiom::optimizer::PnpSummary | int num_unsuccessful_steps
namespace camxiom::optimizer

=== include/camxiom/projection_template.hpp ===
camxiom::projection_template | template <typename T> [[nodiscard]] bool projectDoubleSphere( const T *intrinsics, const T &xi, const T &alpha, const T *dist, int dist_count, const T &x_cam, const T &y_cam, const T &z_cam, T &u_out, T &v_out )
camxiom::projection_template | template <typename T> [[nodiscard]] bool projectEquidistant( const T *intrinsics, const T &x_cam, const T &y_cam, const T &z_cam, T &u_out, T &v_out )
camxiom::projection_template | template <typename T> [[nodiscard]] bool projectEquisolid( const T *intrinsics, const T &x_cam, const T &y_cam, const T &z_cam, T &u_out, T &v_out )
camxiom::projection_template | template <typename T> [[nodiscard]] bool projectEucm( const T *intrinsics, const T &alpha, const T &beta, const T *dist, int dist_count, const T &x_cam, const T &y_cam, const T &z_cam, T &u_out, T &v_out )

camxiom::BuildRectifyMapResult | float vertical_fov_deg

camxiom::ImageRemapOptions | SolverOptions solver_options
camxiom::ImageRemapOptions | bool require_source_in_bounds

camxiom::ImageSize | int height
camxiom::ImageSize | int width
camxiom::InvalidPixelPolicy | #000 WRITE_NEGATIVE_ONE = 0U
camxiom::InvalidPixelPolicy | #001 WRITE_RAW_COORDINATE
camxiom::RectifiedOutputModelOptions | Eigen::Matrix3f src_from_output_rotation
camxiom::RectifiedOutputModelOptions | ImageSize output_size
camxiom::RectifiedOutputModelOptions | RectifiedProjectionType projection_type
camxiom::RectifiedOutputModelOptions | RectifyFitPolicy fit_policy
camxiom::RectifiedOutputModelOptions | float focal_scale
camxiom::RectifiedOutputModelOptions | float source_margin_px
camxiom::RectifiedOutputModelOptions | int boundary_sample_count
camxiom::RectifiedProjectionType | #000 PINHOLE = 0U
camxiom::RectifiedProjectionType | #001 CYLINDRICAL
camxiom::RectifiedProjectionType | #002 STEREOGRAPHIC
camxiom::RectifiedProjectionType | #003 LONGITUDE_LATITUDE
camxiom::RectifyFitPolicy | #000 MAX_INSCRIBED_VALID = 0U
camxiom::RectifyFitPolicy | #001 ALLOW_INVALID_BORDER
camxiom::RectifyFitPolicy | #002 ALL_SOURCE_CONTAINED
namespace camxiom

=== include/camxiom/remap_kernel.hpp ===
camxiom | const char *toString(InterpolationMode mode)
camxiom | enum class InterpolationMode : std::uint8_t
camxiom | struct [[nodiscard]] RemapImageResult
camxiom | template <typename PixelT> [[nodiscard]] RemapImageResult remapImage( const PixelT *src, ImageSize src_size, const float *map_x, const float *map_y, PixelT *dst, ImageSize dst_size, InterpolationMode mode, PixelT fill_value )
camxiom::InterpolationMode | #000 NEAREST = 0U
camxiom::InterpolationMode | #001 BILINEAR
namespace camxiom

=== include/camxiom/ros.hpp ===
camxiom | [[nodiscard]] CameraModel makeCameraModel(const sensor_msgs::msg::CameraInfo &camera_info)
camxiom | [[nodiscard]] StatusCode exportDoubleSphereCameraInfo( const CameraModel &model, DoubleSphereCompatProfile profile, sensor_msgs::msg::CameraInfo &camera_info_out )
camxiom | [[nodiscard]] StatusCode exportEucmCameraInfo( const CameraModel &model, EucmCompatProfile profile, sensor_msgs::msg::CameraInfo &camera_info_out )
camxiom | [[nodiscard]] StatusCode exportFisheyeCameraInfo( const CameraModel &model, FisheyeCompatProfile profile, sensor_msgs::msg::CameraInfo &camera_info_out )
camxiom | [[nodiscard]] StatusCode exportOmnidirectionalCameraInfo( const CameraModel &model, OmnidirectionalCompatProfile profile, sensor_msgs::msg::CameraInfo &camera_info_out )
camxiom | [[nodiscard]] StatusCode exportPinholeCameraInfo( const CameraModel &model, PinholeCompatProfile profile, sensor_msgs::msg::CameraInfo &camera_info_out )
camxiom | [[nodiscard]] StatusCode importDoubleSphereCameraInfo( const sensor_msgs::msg::CameraInfo &camera_info, DoubleSphereCompatProfile profile, CameraModel &model_out )
camxiom | [[nodiscard]] StatusCode importEucmCameraInfo( const sensor_msgs::msg::CameraInfo &camera_info, EucmCompatProfile profile, CameraModel &model_out )
camxiom | [[nodiscard]] StatusCode importFisheyeCameraInfo( const sensor_msgs::msg::CameraInfo &camera_info, FisheyeCompatProfile profile, CameraModel &model_out )
camxiom | [[nodiscard]] StatusCode importOmnidirectionalCameraInfo( const sensor_msgs::msg::CameraInfo &camera_info, OmnidirectionalCompatProfile profile, CameraModel &model_out )
camxiom | [[nodiscard]] StatusCode importPinholeCameraInfo( const sensor_msgs::msg::CameraInfo &camera_info, PinholeCompatProfile profile, CameraModel &model_out )
namespace camxiom

=== include/camxiom/types.hpp ===
camxiom | const char *toString(DistortionModelType model_type)
camxiom | const char *toString(DistortionSpace space)
camxiom | const char *toString(ProjectionModelType model_type)
camxiom | const char *toString(StatusCode status_code)
camxiom | enum class DistortionModelType : std::uint8_t
camxiom | enum class DistortionSpace : std::uint8_t
camxiom | enum class ProjectionModelType : std::uint8_t
camxiom | enum class [[nodiscard]] StatusCode : std::uint8_t
camxiom | struct SolverOptions
camxiom | template <typename T> struct CameraModelT
camxiom | template <typename T> struct DistortionModelT
camxiom | template <typename T> struct IntrinsicsModelT
camxiom | template <typename T> struct Pixel2T
camxiom | template <typename T> struct ProjectionModelT
camxiom | template <typename T> struct Ray3T
camxiom | template <typename T> struct [[nodiscard]] PixelResultT
camxiom | template <typename T> struct [[nodiscard]] RayResultT
camxiom | using CameraModel = CameraModelT<float>
camxiom | using DistortionModel = DistortionModelT<float>
camxiom | using IntrinsicsModel = IntrinsicsModelT<float>
camxiom | using Pixel2 = Pixel2T<float>
camxiom | using PixelResult = PixelResultT<float>
camxiom | using ProjectionModel = ProjectionModelT<float>
camxiom | using Ray3 = Ray3T<float>
camxiom | using RayResult = RayResultT<float>
camxiom::CameraModelT | DistortionModelT<T> distortion
camxiom::CameraModelT | IntrinsicsModelT<T> intrinsics
camxiom::CameraModelT | ProjectionModelT<T> projection
camxiom::DistortionModelT | DistortionModelType type
camxiom::DistortionModelT | DistortionSpace space
camxiom::DistortionModelT | bool has_thin_prism
camxiom::DistortionModelT | bool has_tilt
camxiom::DistortionModelT | bool is_rational
camxiom::DistortionModelT | std::array<T, 14> coeffs
camxiom::DistortionModelT | std::array<T, 9> inv_tilt_matrix
camxiom::DistortionModelT | std::array<T, 9> tilt_matrix
camxiom::DistortionModelT | std::uint8_t count
camxiom::DistortionModelType | #000 NONE = 0U
camxiom::DistortionModelType | #001 RADTAN4
camxiom::DistortionModelType | #002 RADTAN5
camxiom::DistortionModelType | #003 RATIONAL8
camxiom::DistortionModelType | #004 THIN_PRISM12
camxiom::DistortionModelType | #005 TILTED14
camxiom::DistortionModelType | #006 OPENCV_FISHEYE4
camxiom::DistortionModelType | #007 KB4
camxiom::DistortionModelType | #008 KB8
camxiom::DistortionModelType | #009 EQUIDISTANT
camxiom::DistortionModelType | #010 EQUISOLID
camxiom::DistortionModelType | #011 STEREOGRAPHIC
camxiom::DistortionModelType | #012 ORTHOGRAPHIC
camxiom::DistortionModelType | #013 OMNIDIRECTIONAL
camxiom::DistortionModelType | #014 UNKNOWN
camxiom::DistortionSpace | #000 NONE = 0U
camxiom::DistortionSpace | #001 PLANE
camxiom::DistortionSpace | #002 ANGLE
camxiom::IntrinsicsModelT | T cx
camxiom::IntrinsicsModelT | T cy
camxiom::IntrinsicsModelT | T fx
camxiom::IntrinsicsModelT | T fy
camxiom::IntrinsicsModelT | T skew
camxiom::Pixel2T | T u
camxiom::Pixel2T | T v
camxiom::ProjectionModelT | ProjectionModelType type
camxiom::ProjectionModelT | T alpha
camxiom::ProjectionModelT | T beta
camxiom::ProjectionModelT | T theta_max
camxiom::ProjectionModelT | T xi
camxiom::ProjectionModelType | #000 PINHOLE = 0U
camxiom::ProjectionModelType | #001 FISHEYE_THETA
camxiom::ProjectionModelType | #002 OMNIDIRECTIONAL
camxiom::ProjectionModelType | #003 DOUBLE_SPHERE
camxiom::ProjectionModelType | #004 EUCM
camxiom::ProjectionModelType | #005 UNKNOWN
camxiom::Ray3T | Eigen::Matrix<T, 3, 1> direction
camxiom::Ray3T | Eigen::Matrix<T, 3, 1> origin
camxiom::SolverOptions | bool skip_verify
camxiom::SolverOptions | float residual_tolerance
camxiom::SolverOptions | float step_tolerance
camxiom::SolverOptions | int max_iterations
camxiom::StatusCode | #000 OK = 0U
camxiom::StatusCode | #001 INVALID_INPUT
camxiom::StatusCode | #002 INVALID_MODEL
camxiom::StatusCode | #003 BEHIND_CAMERA
camxiom::StatusCode | #004 OUT_OF_FOV
camxiom::StatusCode | #005 DOMAIN_ERROR
camxiom::StatusCode | #006 NON_CONVERGED
camxiom::StatusCode | #007 NUMERIC_ERROR
camxiom::StatusCode | #008 DEGENERATE_CONFIG
namespace camxiom

=== include/camxiom/types64.hpp ===
camxiom | inline CameraModel fromCameraModel64(const CameraModel64 &m64)
camxiom | inline CameraModel64 toCameraModel64(const CameraModel &m)
camxiom | inline SolverOptions64 toSolverOptions64(const SolverOptions &opts)
camxiom | struct SolverOptions64
camxiom | using CameraModel64 = CameraModelT<double>
camxiom | using DistortionModel64 = DistortionModelT<double>
camxiom | using IntrinsicsModel64 = IntrinsicsModelT<double>
camxiom | using Pixel2d = Pixel2T<double>
camxiom | using PixelResult64 = PixelResultT<double>
camxiom | using ProjectionModel64 = ProjectionModelT<double>
camxiom | using Ray3d = Ray3T<double>
camxiom | using RayResult64 = RayResultT<double>
camxiom::SolverOptions64 | bool skip_verify
camxiom::SolverOptions64 | double residual_tolerance
camxiom::SolverOptions64 | double step_tolerance
camxiom::SolverOptions64 | int max_iterations
namespace camxiom

=== include/camxiom/validated_model.hpp ===
camxiom | class ValidatedCameraModel
camxiom::ValidatedCameraModel | PixelResult rayToPixel(const Eigen::Vector3f &ray_direction) const
camxiom::ValidatedCameraModel | PixelResult rayToPixel(const Ray3 &ray) const
camxiom::ValidatedCameraModel | PixelResult rayToPixel(float x_direction, float y_direction, float z_direction) const
camxiom::ValidatedCameraModel | ProjectionModelType projectionType() const noexcept
camxiom::ValidatedCameraModel | RayResult pixelToRay(const Pixel2 &pixel, const SolverOptions &solver_options = SolverOptions{}) const
camxiom::ValidatedCameraModel | RayResult pixelToRay(float u, float v, const SolverOptions &solver_options = SolverOptions{}) const
camxiom::ValidatedCameraModel | [[nodiscard]] static std::optional<ValidatedCameraModel> tryMake(const CameraModel &model)
camxiom::ValidatedCameraModel | const CameraModel &get() const noexcept
namespace camxiom

=== include/camxiom/version.hpp ===
